action_definition: [dx, dy, dz, droll, dpitch, dyaw, gripper]

openpi_metadata.action_definition: [dx, dy, dz, droll, dpitch, dyaw, gripper]

action_semantics.dx: end-effector x delta in meters per control step
action_semantics.dy: end-effector y delta in meters per control step
action_semantics.dz: end-effector z delta in meters per control step
action_semantics.droll: end-effector roll delta in radians per control step
action_semantics.dpitch: end-effector pitch delta in radians per control step
action_semantics.dyaw: end-effector yaw delta in radians per control step
action_semantics.gripper: -1 open, +1 close; v2 has dense goal-state labels and no preclose8 relabeling
